response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive experience in software development, leadership, and open-source projects, aligning well with the Tech Lead role. His background includes senior positions at high-profile companies (Stripe, Shopify) and leadership in open-source initiatives, though his German proficiency is basic and experience in UML modeling is not explicitly mentioned.
strengths: Extensive senior-level experience in software development and leadership at top-tier tech companies (Stripe, Shopify).
Strong open-source contributions and project ownership, including founding Datadog and contributing to GISCollective.
Proven technical expertise across multiple languages (TypeScript, D, Python, Java) and systems (Linux, Kubernetes, Docker).
concerns: German language proficiency is only at a basic level (not matching the required C1).
No explicit mention of UML expertise or formal project management experience in the resume.
Limited evidence of strategic IT architecture or security leadership in the provided experience.
